zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Venables 12th ggf於大約1465年出生在英國爾時，他的父親Sir William Henry de Venables of Kinderton, Lord of Marbury27歲，母親Petronelle Caverswall25歲。他於大約1491年與Cecile Stanley 12th ggm在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1513年9月9日在英國諾圖波藍德布藍斯頓享年49歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Venables 12th ggf于大约1465年出生在英国爾时，他的父亲Sir William Henry de Venables of Kinderton, Lord of Marbury27岁，母亲Petronelle Caverswall25岁。他于大约1491年与Cecile Stanley 12th ggm在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1513年9月9日在英国諾圖波藍德布藍斯頓享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: Venables
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Venables (Eure), perhaps named with Late Latin venabulum ‘hunting ground’ (a derivative of venari ‘to hunt’).

variants.name: Venable
meanings: History: American bearers of this name are descended from Abraham Venables, who came to VA from England in or before 1687.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Venables 12th ggf was born about 1465, in Cheshire, England, his father, Sir William Henry de Venables of Kinderton, Lord of Marbury, was 27 and his mother, Petronelle Caverswall, was 25. He married Cecile Stanley 12th ggm about 1491, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 9 September 1513, in Branxton, Northumberland, England, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Venables 12th ggf est né environ 1465, à Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Henry de Venables of Kinderton, Lord of Marbury, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Petronelle Caverswall, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Cecile Stanley 12th ggm environ 1491, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 9 septembre 1513, à Branxton, Northumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Venables 12th ggf um 1465 in Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Henry de Venables of Kinderton, Lord of Marbury 27 und seine Mutter Petronelle Caverswall 25. Er hat um 1491 in England Cecile Stanley 12th ggm geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 9. September 1513 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Branxton, Northumberland, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Venables 12th ggf è nato il circa 1465 nel Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Sir William Henry de Venables of Kinderton, Lord of Marbury, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Petronelle Caverswall, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Cecile Stanley 12th ggm circa 1491, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 9 settembre 1513, nel Branxton, Northumberland, England, all'età di 49 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Venables 12th ggfが約1465年にイギリスチェシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir William Henry de Venables of Kinderton, Lord of Marburyは27歳，母Petronelle Caverswallは25歳であった。約1491年にイギリスでCecile Stanley 12th ggmと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1513年9月9日にイギリスノースウンバーランドブランクストンで49歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Venables 12th ggf(이)가 대략 1465년 영국 체실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Henry de Venables of Kinderton, Lord of Marbury(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Petronelle Caverswall(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1491년 영국에서 Cecile Stanley 12th ggm(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1513년 9월 9일 영국 노르스벌랜드 브랜스턴에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Venables 12th ggf nasceu aproximadamente 1465, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Henry de Venables of Kinderton, Lord of Marbury, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Petronelle Caverswall, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Cecile Stanley 12th ggm aproximadamente 1491, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 9 de setembro de 1513, em Branxton, Northumberland, Inglaterra, com 49 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Venables 12th ggf родился около 1465 г. в местности чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William Henry de Venables of Kinderton, Lord of Marbury было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Petronelle Caverswall, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Cecile Stanley 12th ggm около 1491 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 9 сентября 1513 г. в местности бранкстон, нортумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 49 лет.

Se casó con Cecile Stanley 12th ggm aproximadamente 1491, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 9 de septiembre de 1513, en Branxton, Northumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 49 años.
